title: China, Russia to deepen political mutual trust — Xi Jinping
description: Since the Sino-Russian relations entered into a new era their level has been constantly rising, the content of friendship has been enriched, while the idea of f...
snippet:
BEIJING, May 16. /TASS/. Beijing and Moscow intend to deepen political mutual trust, adhering to the non-alignment principle, Chinese leader Xi Jinping said.
